title: Brokers are High on These Intriguing Tech Stocks is it Still Time to Buy?
text: Wall Street is bullish on quite a few lesser-known tech stocks that investors will want to pay attention to. Considering their average broker recommendation (ABR), here are three of these stocks that stand out in particular.

title: AMETEK Promotes Dalip Puri to Senior Vice President, Operational Finance
text: BERWYN, Pa. , Sept. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) today announced that it has named Dalip Puri as Senior Vice President, Operational Finance, effective September 1, 2023.

title: AMETEK Acquires United Electronic Industries
text: BERWYN, Pa. , Sept. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) today announced the acquisition of United Electronic Industries (UEI), a leading provider of data acquisition and control solutions for the aerospace, defense, energy and semiconductor industries.
